resolves: M07A TBD: loose ARIADNE_CAD_JOB_IN/_OUT env vars did not reliably drive a custom op from a startup .scr
path_convention: forward-slash, UTF-8 (utf8ToWide); no JSON unescaping by the hand-rolled reader
fallback: interactive ARIADNE_CAD_JOB_IN/OUT/HOST_MODE prompts only when the env channel is absent
attended_use: tools/attended/run_attended_m07b.ps1 drives the same channel with host_mode=full_autocad to create an AriadneProbe (extend.customclass.create) in a dedicated acad.exe before serving CADAGENT_PUMP
